raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has a historic $75 billion surplus, three times what was projected just four months ago.",
    "A proposed Baby Bond program would put money into a publicly funded trust account for every child at birth, with more allocated for lower-income families.",
    "An analysis by Naomi Zewde at CUNY indicates that the Baby Bond proposal can dramatically reduce wealth disparities.",
    "Investing in early childhood education is described as a smart investment for kids, families, and communities.",
    "Policies that support asset-building, such as matched savings accounts, can help break generational poverty."
  ]
}
```
